get.description: Get a specific location by ID or name.

post.description: Attach a resource to a location.

Create a new location by instantiating a LocationTemplate.

Requires node bindings to map abstract roles to concrete node instance names.
Representation data is merged from template defaults + overrides.

delete.description: Delete a specific location by name.

get.description: Get a specific location by name.

delete.description: Delete a location template by name.

get.description: Get a location template by name.

delete.description: Delete a representation template by name.

get.description: Get a representation template by name.

delete.description: Detach the resource from a location.

get.description:
Export all locations as a JSON list.

Semantically distinct from GET /locations for import/export workflows.

Get the resource hierarchy for resources currently at a specific location.

Args:
    location_name: Location name to query

Returns:
    ResourceHierarchy: Hierarchy of resources at the location, or empty hierarchy if no attached resource

Raises:
    HTTPException: If location not found

Export current settings for backup/replication.

This endpoint allows exporting the current manager settings in a format
suitable for backup, documentation, or replicating the configuration
to another environment. Secrets are always redacted from the API
endpoint for safety.

Args:
    include_defaults: If True, include fields with default values.
                     If False, only include non-default settings.
    include_schema: If True, include JSON schema for documentation.

Returns:
    dict: Settings as a dictionary with sensitive fields redacted.

Get the current transfer graph as adjacency list.

Returns:
    Dict mapping location IDs to lists of reachable location IDs

Health check endpoint for the manager.

This endpoint is automatically inherited by all manager subclasses.
Managers that override get_health() will automatically have their
custom health checks exposed through this endpoint.

Returns:
    ManagerHealth: The current health status

post.description:
Import multiple locations in bulk.

Parameters
----------
locations:
    List of Location objects to import.
overwrite:
    If True, overwrite existing locations with the same name.
    If False (default), skip duplicates.

Returns
-------
LocationImportResult with counts and imported locations.

Idempotent init: get-or-create, version-update.

If template exists with same version, return it unchanged.
If template exists with different version, update and return.
If template doesn't exist, create and return.

Idempotent init: get-or-create, version-update.

If template exists with same version, return it unchanged.
If template exists with different version, update and return.
If template doesn't exist, create and return.

Plan a transfer workflow from source to target.

Args:
    source_location: Source location ID
    target_location: Target location ID

Returns:
    Composite workflow definition to execute the transfer

Raises:
    HTTPException: If no transfer path exists

delete.description: Remove representations for a location for a specific node.

post.description: Set representations for a location for a specific node.
Manually trigger reconciliation of unresolved template references.

template_name.title: Template Name
template_name.description: Name of the LocationTemplate to instantiate.

node_bindings.title: Node Bindings
node_bindings.description: Mapping of abstract role names to concrete node instance names.

representation_overrides.title: Representation Overrides
representation_overrides.description: Per-role overrides to merge with representation template defaults. Key is role name.

resource_template_overrides.title: Resource Template Overrides
resource_template_overrides.description: Overrides for resource template fields (merged with template defaults).

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional description for the new location.

allow_transfers.title: Allow Transfers
allow_transfers.description: Override the template default for allow_transfers.

CreateLocationFromTemplateRequest.title: CreateLocationFromTemplateRequest
CreateLocationFromTemplateRequest.description:
Request to create a location from a LocationTemplate.

Requires node bindings to map abstract roles to concrete node instance names.

resource_id.title: Resource ID
resource_id.description: The ID of the resource associated with the Location.

representations.title: Location Representation Map
representations.description: A dictionary of different representations of the location. Allows creating an association between a specific key (like a node name or id) and a relevant representation of the location (like joint angles, a specific actuator, etc).

resource_template_name.title: Resource Template Name
resource_template_name.description: Name of the Resource Template to be used for creating a resource associated with this location (if any) on location initialization.

resource_template_overrides.title: Resource Template Overrides
resource_template_overrides.description: Optional overrides to apply when creating a resource from the template for this specific location.

allow_transfers.title: Allow Transfers
allow_transfers.description: Whether this location can be used as a source or target in transfers. Non-transfer locations are excluded from transfer graph construction.

reservation.title: Reservation
reservation.description: The current reservation on this location, if any.

location_template_name.title: Location Template Name
location_template_name.description: Name of the LocationTemplate used to create this location (for traceability).

node_bindings.title: Node Bindings
node_bindings.description: Mapping of abstract role names to concrete node instance names (for traceability).

template_name.title: Template Name
template_name.description: Unique name for this representation template (e.g. 'robotarm_deck_access').

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of this representation template.

default_values.title: Default Values
default_values.description: Default field values for this representation. Merged with overrides at instantiation.

schema_def.title: JSON Schema
schema_def.description: Optional JSON Schema for validating representation data.

required_overrides.title: Required Overrides
required_overrides.description: Fields that must be provided when instantiating a location from this template.

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: ID of the node or operator that created this template.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: When this template was last updated.

LocationRepresentationTemplate.title: LocationRepresentationTemplate
LocationRepresentationTemplate.description:
A named, versioned template for node-specific location representation data.

Registered by nodes during startup or by operators via API. Defines the
schema, defaults, and required overrides for a particular node type's
representation of locations.

Example: A robot arm registers ``"robotarm_deck_access"`` with defaults
``{"gripper_config": "standard", "max_payload": 2.0}`` and
``required_overrides=["position"]``.

owned_by.title: Owned By
owned_by.description: Who has ownership of the reservation.

template_name.title: Template Name
template_name.description: Unique name for this location template (e.g. 'ot2_deck_slot').

description.title: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of this location template.

resource_template_name.title: Resource Template Name
resource_template_name.description: Name of the ResourceTemplate to use for creating a resource on instantiation.

resource_template_overrides.title: Resource Template Overrides
resource_template_overrides.description: Default overrides to apply when creating a resource from the template.

representation_templates.title: Representation Templates
representation_templates.description: Mapping of abstract role names to representation template names.

default_allow_transfers.title: Default Allow Transfers
default_allow_transfers.description: Default value for allow_transfers when creating locations from this template.

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: ID of the node or operator that created this template.

updated_at.title: Updated At
updated_at.description: When this template was last updated.

LocationTemplate.title: LocationTemplate
LocationTemplate.description:
A named, versioned blueprint for creating locations.

Maps abstract role names to representation template names. Resource-free
and node-free — no specific node instances or resource IDs. At instantiation
time, node bindings map roles to concrete node names.

Example: ``"ot2_deck_slot"`` with
``representation_templates: {"deck_controller": "lh_deck_repr", "transfer_arm": "robotarm_deck_access"}``

user_id.title: User ID
user_id.description: The ID of the user who owns the object.

experiment_id.title: Experiment ID
experiment_id.description: The ID of the experiment that owns the object.

campaign_id.title: Campaign ID
campaign_id.description: The ID of the campaign that owns the object.

project_id.title: Project ID
project_id.description: The ID of the project that owns the object.

node_id.title: Node ID
node_id.description: The ID of the node that owns the object.

workcell_id.title: Workcell ID
workcell_id.description: The ID of the workcell that owns the object.

lab_id.title: Lab ID
lab_id.description: The ID of the lab that owns the object.

step_id.title: Step ID
step_id.description: The ID of the step that owns the object.

workflow_id.title: Workflow ID
workflow_id.description: The ID of the workflow that owns the object.

manager_id.title: Manager ID
manager_id.description: The ID of the manager that owns the object.

OwnershipInfo.title: OwnershipInfo
OwnershipInfo.description: Information about the ownership of a MADSci object.
